channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Victrola Teams Up With Jack White’s Third Man Records on a New Turntable and Speakers Set
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to Trending on Billboard, your go-to source for the latest music news and product releases. I'm your host, and today we're excited to share with you a special collaboration between Victrola and Jack White's Third Man Records.
[Music transitions to a smooth, instrumental track]
Host: "In celebration of Record Store Day 2026, Victrola has partnered with Third Man Records to create a limited-edition turntable and speaker set. This exclusive bundle includes the Victrola Wave turntable and a pair of Tempo bookshelf Bluetooth speakers, all wrapped up in Third Man Records' iconic black and yellow colorway.
[Sound effects: A record scratching, followed by a short clip of music playing on a turntable]
Host: "The Victrola Wave turntable was our pick for best turntable at CES 2025, and for good reason. It delivers premium audio, Bluetooth connections, and a sleek, modern design. The Tempo speakers are the perfect match, with precise sound reproduction and wireless connectivity. Together, they produce deep, rich audio with warm and clear tones, and punchy bass that's perfect for rock, blues, hip-hop, and country music.
[Music transitions to a short clip of Jack White's music]
Host: "The limited-edition Victrola Third Man Records Turntable Set is priced at $649.99, which is a steal considering you'd pay $749.98 if you bought the turntable and speakers separately. As Ben Blackwell, co-founder of Third Man Records, says, 'Set the volume to stun and be blown back and blown away by the sonic magnificence on display.'
[Sound effects: A turntable needle dropping, followed by applause]
Host: "The Victrola Third Man Records Turntable Set is available now at Victrola.com. Don't miss out on this unique opportunity to elevate your music listening experience. Check out the link in our show notes to learn more and get your hands on this limited-edition set.
[Outro music plays]
Host: "Thanks for tuning in to this episode of Trending on Billboard. For more product recommendations and music news, be sure to check out our website and follow us on social media. Until next time, keep on spinning!"
